## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test improvements

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

### Testing (TDD)
- [ ] I wrote tests BEFORE implementing the feature (TDD)
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass (`pnpm run test:run`)
- [ ] Test coverage is maintained or improved

### TypeScript
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`pnpm exec tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] No use of `any` type (use `unknown` with type guards)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG if this is a user-facing change

### Security
- [ ] I have not introduced any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] No secrets or API keys are committed
- [ ] Input validation is in place for new endpoints
